title: CASEINCOMPLETE reported for valid flop description

features.name: incomplete case in sequential procedural block
features.description: Code should include a case statement inside a sequential procedural block (always @(posedge clk)) that does not cover all possible case values, relying on implicit state hold behavior

features.name: if-else chain without final else in sequential block
features.description: Code should include an if-else if chain without a final else branch, inside a sequential procedural block, where the missing else implicitly holds state
